---
title: "Modernization Governance — Whitepaper"
subtitle: "Governing the AD to Entra ID migration at federal scale"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Whitepaper in preparation
This whitepaper is being drafted from the [Modernization Program documentation](../modernization/index.qmd). For current coverage, see the [Modernization Overview](../executive-briefs/modernization-overview.qmd) and the [AD to Entra ID migration guide](../modernization/identity-orgtree/index.qmd).
:::
